releases.description:
## [1.3.0](https://github.com/aegixx/obsidian-contact-cards/compare/1.2.1...1.3.0) (2026-02-04)


### Features

* support wiki-link syntax for local images ([1568b5b](https://github.com/aegixx/obsidian-contact-cards/commit/1568b5beba5dcf94e2c7cc01ac90af76718b121e))
* support wiki-link syntax for local images ([1568b5b](https://github.com/aegixx/obsidian-contact-cards/commit/1568b5beba5dcf94e2c7cc01ac90af76718b121e))
* support wiki-link syntax for local images in photo and logo fields ([798da0b](https://github.com/aegixx/obsidian-contact-cards/commit/798da0b00cc4f704d1daf7a4095b3a5937d6e747)), closes [#3](https://github.com/aegixx/obsidian-contact-cards/issues/3)


### Bug Fixes

* guard fromJSON calls when release-please outputs no PR ([d4485c6](https://github.com/aegixx/obsidian-contact-cards/commit/d4485c6a62c85758e2c27eb35aa06e98cd4df104))

releases.name: v1.2.1

releases.author: aegixx
releases.description:
Minor enhancements:
- Remove dependency on NodeJS `crypto` library (allows this to function on mobile)
- Fix some cosmetic items to better align with Obsidian guidance

releases.author: aegixx
releases.description:
- Refactor to remove `innerHtml` usage (security vulnerability)
- Removed custom template support (this was necessary, as there is not currently a way to populate this without using `innerHtml`)

releases.author: aegixx
releases.description:
- Modified default styles to more consistently leverage Obsidian CSS variables
- Setting labels now reflect Obsidian plugin best practices

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/aegixx/obsidian-contact-cards/compare/1.0.0...1.0.1

releases.author: aegixx
releases.description:
**Initial Release**
- **Beautiful Formatting**: Display name, title, company, email, and phone number in a clean, business-card style layout.
- **Simple Syntax**: Just provide a `contact-card` code block with YAML fields, and the plugin will handle the rest.
- **Customizable**: Adjust styling by modifying the plugin’s CSS or by creating your own Obsidian CSS snippets.
- **Powerful Integrations**:
  - Photos automatically populated based on email address
  - Company logos pulled based on email domain (when Company name is provided)
  - Clickable fields for more context (phone, email, location, etc)
  
  **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/aegixx/obsidian-contact-cards/commits/1.0.0
